what can contour plowing reduce what can contour plowing reduce what can contour plowing reduce what can contour plowing reduce what can contour plowing reduce Contour plowing is a farming technique designed to reduce soil erosion and improve water infiltration. By plowing across the slope of a field rather than up and down the slope, this method helps to slow down water runoff and allows more time for rainwater to infiltrate the soil. This practice can significantly reduce soil erosion, preserving topsoil and preventing nutrient depletion. Additionally, contour plowing reduces sedimentation in nearby water bodies, which can improve water quality and support aquatic ecosystems. Overall, contour plowing serves as an effective strategy for sustainable agriculture by maintaining soil health and enhancing the environmental benefits of farmland.
